apply_next_skin.description: Switch to next available appearance skin of the item.
apply_next_skin.disabled_description: Item skin cannot be changed now.

clay_door.description: Probably the most basic clay fixture to have ever been designed.
clay_door.flavor: "We've recently realised one can repaint these from one colour to another." -- Ember Iskender, Debt of Applied Poetery

clay_latticed_door.description: Lets in the Hearthlings, the air, the bugs...
clay_latticed_door.flavor: ...actually it would be easier to list things it does not let in.

clay_latticed_window_frame_large.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
clay_latticed_window_frame_large.flavor: Lets in all the desert air and only smaller bugs

clay_latticed_window_frame_small.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
clay_latticed_window_frame_small.flavor: "Cool, tall and no bugs inside!" -Aaryn, Pragmatist

clay_latticed_window_frame_tall.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
clay_latticed_window_frame_tall.flavor: Lets the desert in, but not the bugs!

clay_latticed_window_frame_wide.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
clay_latticed_window_frame_wide.flavor: "Cool, wide and no bugs inside!" -Shazah, Another Pragmatist

clay_latticed_window_large.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

clay_latticed_window_small.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
clay_latticed_window_small.flavor: Air is in, bugs stay out. Doesn't let much light in.

clay_latticed_window_tall.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
clay_latticed_window_tall.flavor: "Cool, tall and no bugs inside!" -Aaryn, Pragmatist

clay_latticed_window_wide.description: Latticed clay windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
clay_latticed_window_wide.flavor: "Cool, wide and no bugs inside!" -Shazah, Another Pragmatist

clay_window_frame_large.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.
clay_window_frame_large.flavor: Lets in all the desert air. Not recommended for sandstorms.

clay_window_frame_small.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.
clay_window_frame_small.flavor: Lets in the soft desert air

clay_window_frame_tall.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.
clay_window_frame_tall.flavor: "Windowsill can cool a really tall pie" -Aaryn, Pragmatist

clay_window_frame_wide.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.
clay_window_frame_wide.flavor: "Windowsill can cool a really wide pie" -Shazah, Another Pragmatist

clay_window_large.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.
clay_window_large.flavor: Officially endorsed by the Order of Applied Equivocation.

clay_window_small.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.

clay_window_tall.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.
clay_window_tall.flavor: Still lets in the soft desert air

clay_window_wide.description: Clay windows without lattices let critters and projectiles through.
clay_window_wide.flavor: Designed so you can see more sand.

cobblestone_window.description: This primitive window will let critters and projectiles through.

cobblestone_window_large.description: This primitive window will let critters and projectiles through.

cobblestone_window_tall.description: This primitive window will let critters and projectiles through.
cobblestone_window_tall.flavor: Extra height adds an air of elegance. To your cave.

cobblestone_window_wide.description: This primitive window will let critters and projectiles through.

iron_double_door.description: Studier than wooden or stone doors.

iron_window.description: Hard to break means hard to break in!
iron_window.flavor: If a captive mind is unaware of being in prison, it is living in error.

iron_window_large.description: Schools, barracks, hospitals all resemble prisons.
iron_window_large.flavor: Monte Cristo? We should file that one under "Educational" too, oughten we?

iron_window_tall.description: Nor airless dungeon, nor strong links of iron, can be retentive to the strength of spirit.
iron_window_tall.flavor: But life, being weary of these worldly bars, never lacks power to dismiss itself.

iron_window_wide.description: Stone walls do not a prison make, nor iron bars a cage.
iron_window_wide.flavor: Minds innocent and quiet take that for an hermitage.

iron_wooden_door.description: Studier than wooden or stone doors.

iron_wooden_double_door.description: Studier than wooden or stone double doors.

stone_window.description: Unlike stone window frames, stone windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

stone_window_frame.description: Stone window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

stone_window_frame_large.description: Stone window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

stone_window_frame_tall.description: Stone window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

stone_window_frame_wide.description: Stone window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

stone_window_large.description: Unlike stone window frames, stone windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

stone_window_tall.description: Unlike stone window frames, stone windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

stone_window_wide.description: Unlike stone window frames, stone windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
stone_window_wide.flavor: It's a panoramic view. Behind bars.

stone_wooden_door_2.flavor: This here pattern, I learned from the Squarefolk.

stone_wooden_double_door.description: A larger door. It makes quite an impression.
stone_wooden_double_door.flavor: Some people want to make an entrance... every day.

stone_wooden_tunnel_door.description: Useful for sealing off mine tunnels.

wooden_window.description: Unlike wooden window frames, wooden windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
wooden_window.flavor: Sides of a window frame are called montants, or ports.

wooden_window_frame.description: Wooden window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

wooden_window_frame_large.description: Wooden window frames will let critters or projectiles through.
wooden_window_frame_large.flavor: The entire window frame can be called a chambranle or an antepagmentum.

wooden_window_frame_tall.description: Wooden window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

wooden_window_frame_wide.description: Wooden window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

wooden_window_large.description: Unlike wooden window frames, wooden windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

wooden_window_tall.description: Unlike wooden window frames, wooden windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
wooden_window_tall.flavor: Vertical element dividing the window is called a mullion.

wooden_window_wide.description: Unlike wooden window frames, wooden windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
wooden_window_wide.flavor: The top part of a window is called a traverse or supercilium

wooden_tiny_window_frame.description: Tiny windows are too small to let critters or projectiles through.
wooden_tiny_window_frame.flavor: Sides of a window frame are called montants, or ports.

wooden_tiny_window_frame_tall.description: Tiny windows are too small to let critters or projectiles through.
wooden_tiny_window_frame_tall.flavor: Therefore, tiny tall windows cannot be used as functional arrowslits.

wooden_tiny_window_frame_wide.description: Tiny windows are too small to let critters or projectiles through.
wooden_tiny_window_frame_wide.flavor: Due to in-game physics, they also block liquid flow.

input_bin_stone.description: A versatile container for any resource, to help keep crafters supplied.
input_bin_stone.flavor: Think of what we can achieve when Hearthlings work together!

input_bin_wood.description: A versatile container for any resource, to help keep crafters supplied.

output_box_clay_dyed.flavor: Crafters love to show off their work!

output_box_iron.flavor: Crafters love to show off their work!

banner_wall_standard.description: Show your town pride with this standard.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Oleanders but another herb can be chosen.

ornate_throw_rug_small.flavor: You will feel bad for stepping on it.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Cacti but another herb can be chosen.

throw_rug_small.description: Brightens up that old dusty floor.

window_box_brightbell_large.description: A longer home for the plant.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Brightbells but another herb can be chosen.

window_box_carved_violet.description: A tidy home for some lovely flowers.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Violets but another herb can be chosen.

window_box_frostsnap_large.description: A longer home for the plant.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Frostsnaps but another herb can be chosen.

window_box_stone_snow_poppy.description: A tidy home for some lovely flowers.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Has Snow Poppies but another herb can be chosen.

window_box_stone_snow_poppy_large.description: A longer home for some lovely flowers.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Has Snow Poppies but another herb can be chosen.

window_box_stone_violet_large.description: A longer home for some lovely flowers.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Violets but another herb can be chosen.

comfy_arch_backed_chair.description: Just in case kneeling exhausted you

comfy_stone_chair.flavor: "Heavens! What am I sitting on?" --Violet Crawley, Dowager Countess of Grantham

comfy_stool.description: Leaning too much may cause gravitation problems.
comfy_stool.flavor: Life is way easier with pillows.

iron_bed.description: It is possible to sleep in it.

iron_chair.description: May not be the most comfortable.

iron_comfy_bed.description: Solid and comfortable, perfect spot for a nap.
iron_comfy_bed.flavor: It's quite soft for a metal object.

iron_desk.description: Cute little workspace with a solid base.

ornate_arch_backed_chair.description: Does this gold come from a tithe?
ornate_arch_backed_chair.flavor: Church of Plenty may ask to return it.

ornate_comfy_arch_backed_chair.flavor: By the way, have you seen anyone praying here?

ornate_comfy_stool.flavor: You may fall asleep sitting on it.

ornate_wooden_stool.flavor: I guess it is if you get used to gold.

simple_wooden_stool.description: While sitting food is 20% more effective.
simple_wooden_stool.flavor: Good if you prefer a rustical touch.

window_box_brightbell_large_recipe.description: A planter box full of brightbell flowers, built to be placed below wide window frames.
window_box_brightbell_large_recipe.flavor: A brightbell a day keeps the Ogres away!

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Brightbells but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

window_box_frostsnap_large_recipe.description: A planter box full of Frostsnap flowers, built to be placed below wide window frames.
window_box_frostsnap_large_recipe.flavor: The capstone of a civilized dwelling.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Frostsnaps but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

window_box_carved_violet_recipe.description: A planter box full of violet flowers, built to be placed below window frames.
window_box_carved_violet_recipe.flavor: The capstone of a civilized dwelling.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames.  Comes with Violets but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

window_box_snow_poppy_large_recipe.description: A planter box full of Snow Poppy flowers, built to be placed below wide window frames.
window_box_snow_poppy_large_recipe.flavor: A dark arctic morning is always made brighter with a poppy.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Snow Poppies but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

window_box_snow_poppy_recipe.description: A planter box full of Snow Poppy flowers, built to be placed below window frames.
window_box_snow_poppy_recipe.flavor: A dark arctic morning is always made brighter with a poppy.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Snow Poppies but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

window_box_violet_large_recipe.description: A planter box full of Violet flowers, built to be placed below wide window frames.
window_box_violet_large_recipe.flavor: The capstone of a civilized dwelling.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Snow Poppies but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

golden_clay_wall_planter_large_recipe.flavor: Water? Soil? Seeds? Since when is that needed? --Acolyte of Rayya's Mystery

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames.  Includes Oleanders but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

potted_cactus_large_recipe.flavor: Aren't cacti just vegan hedgehogs? --Jessica, somewhat smart.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Cacti but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

fur_rug_small_recipe.description: A warm and cozy rug, sewn from various animal pelts.
fur_rug_small_recipe.flavor: Perfect for an evening by the fire.

skin_changer.tip_description: This item has skins which can be changed while and after placing the item:

place_item.tip_description:
Rotate with [str(left_binding)] and [str(right_binding)] keys.
Change skin with [str(change_skin)] key.

Rotate with [str(left_binding)] and [str(right_binding)] keys.
Change skin with [str(change_skin)] key.
